summary: Incident/debug with master handoff: gather evidence from logs/code (read-only) then WEA master decides mitigation vs root-cause fix and dispatches edit graph. Tags: incident outage crash debug log stacktrace handoff master.

nodes.promptTemplate:
Incident / debug report:
${task}

You are a READ-ONLY triage agent (pi). Collect evidence for the WEA master; do not apply hotfixes.

Do:
1. Extract symptoms, timeline, error codes, stack frames from the task text.
2. Map frames/symbols to repo files; read critical handlers.
3. Distinguish likely user error / config / code defect / dependency.
4. Note blast radius (which endpoints/jobs share the path).
5. Suggest evidence still missing (metrics, repro) under risks.

OUTPUT: exactly one JSON object:
{
  "summary": "<incident in one sentence>",
  "files_seen": ["..."],
  "change_surface": ["suspect code"],
  "symptoms": ["..."],
  "hypotheses": [{"rank": 1, "kind": "code|config|dep|user", "why": "..."}],
  "blast_radius": ["..."],
  "subtasks": ["what master should decide"],
  "risks": ["missing data, prod-only"],
  "tests_related": ["..."]
}
